allow: PowerShell($items = @\('app','gradle','.gradle','.idea','build.gradle.kts','settings.gradle.kts','gradle.properties','gradlew','gradlew.bat','local.properties','.gitignore'\); foreach \($i in $items\) { $src = Join-Path 'd:\\IoT-Dashboard' $i; if \(Test-Path $src\) { Move-Item -Path $src -Destination 'd:\\IoT-Dashboard\\android\\' -Force; Write-Output "moved: $i" } else { Write-Output "missing: $i" } })
